refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall ensure operational availability meets or exceeds the customer-defined target by minimizing downtime and enabling rapid recovery.
refined_fr.rationale: Availability KPI is decomposed to focus on minimizing downtime and enabling rapid recovery, which are key contributors to availability. This allows targeted design parameters and implementation modules to address specific aspects of availability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure system uptime and downtime over the evaluation period and compare against the customer-defined availability target.
sub_frs: FR1: Minimize unplanned downtime of the NGHE solution.
FR2: Enable rapid recovery and restoration of NGHE solution after faults.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement predictive maintenance and fault detection algorithms to minimize unplanned downtime.
DP2: Design modular and redundant system components to enable rapid recovery and fault isolation.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement predictive maintenance and fault detection algorithms to minimize unplanned downtime.

potential_sources: Interaction between fault detection and recovery mechanisms
Dependency on telemetry data for predictive maintenance
coupling_check.notes: DP1 and DP2 are logically coupled but can be modularized; predictive maintenance primarily depends on telemetry input, which is well-defined.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of reliable telemetry data for fault detection.
Risk that predictive algorithms may not detect all failure modes.
High safety criticality requires robust fault detection to avoid unsafe states.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating DP2 in next decomposition level to address recovery explicitly.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for availability management including predictive maintenance and fault detection.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives sensor and operational data from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules for fault detection.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends alerts to Safety Services module upon detection of critical faults affecting availability.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as availability logic is centralized here; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle provides telemetry data but does not contain availability logic.
Teleoperation provides telemetry and tasking but limited containment of availability logic.
Receives alerts but does not implement availability logic.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing availability logic in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and improves maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too complex.
Dependency on accurate telemetry data from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor complexity of NGHE Solution module; consider sub-modularization if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly maps to selected DP focusing on predictive maintenance to minimize downtime.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized availability logic in NGHE Solution module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as best ownership candidate.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Availability can be verified via operational data and telemetry monitoring.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of availability logic to NGHE Solution with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Plan next level decomposition to address rapid recovery (FR2) and modular redundancy (DP2).
Ensure telemetry data quality and interface robustness.

decision.justification: Current level decomposition is sound but availability KPI requires further decomposition to cover recovery aspects and redundancy for completeness.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Minimize unplanned downtime of the NGHE solution.
FR2: Enable rapid recovery and restoration of NGHE solution after faults.

revise.why: To explicitly include recovery and redundancy aspects in availability requirements for comprehensive design.

assumptions: Telemetry data is reliable and timely.
Predictive maintenance algorithms can be effectively implemented.
open_risks: Complexity growth in NGHE Solution module.
evidence_needed: Validation results of predictive maintenance algorithms.
